name: Yapori Minigames
short_description: Yapori Minigames is a single-player game with minigames and various playable characters!
detailed_description:
Yapori Minigames is a single-player game with minigames and various playable characters!

Several different and challenging minigames, such as the meteor minigame, where you have to dodge meteors before time runs out, the ball minigame, where you can't let the balls fall to the ground, and much more!

Level up to unlock characters!

More than 5 skins to unlock, such as Darkpori, a fox with a gray scarf and blue shoes, Aybo, a smart and somewhat annoying robot, Jack, a crazy yellow monkey, and many more!

Multiplayer mode where you can play the minigames with a friend!

And much more!
